---
title: "exploration"
description: "testest"
draft: true
---

::: panel-tabset

### R dplyr

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
# subset a few columns for simplicity
sw <- starwars[, 1:7]
```

### Python pandas
```{python}
import pandas as pd
# this imports the sw dataset from the R code chunk
sw = r.sw
```
:::

## Subset rows and columns by index

::: panel-tabset

### dplyr

```{r, message=FALSE}
# rows
sw[1:3, ]
# columns
sw[, 1:3]
```

### pandas

```{python, results=FALSE}
# rows
sw.iloc[0:3]   
# columns
sw.iloc[:, 0:3]
```

:::
